CrazeDev Studio Admin Panel
Admin Dashboard
Manage all website content, team profiles, portfolio projects, and client submissions. Connect your Firebase config to activate live data.
📁
Portfolio Manager
Add, edit, or remove portfolio projects. Changes reflect live on the website via Firestore in real time.
👥
Team Members
Update team profiles, upload new photos, edit roles and expertise descriptions for all members.
📬
Contact Requests
View all contact form submissions, service requests, and lead data collected from the website.
📢
Announcements
Publish site-wide announcements. Manage active and archived announcement banners.
📊
Service Requests
Track all service enquiries, update statuses, assign team members, and monitor progress.
🔧
Site Settings
Update hero content, service descriptions, SEO metadata, and other dynamic homepage content.
👤
User Management
Manage registered users, assign admin roles, view accounts, and control portal access levels.
📧
Newsletter Subscribers
View and export all newsletter subscribers collected via the website footer signup form.
🖼️
Image & Media
Upload and manage team profile photos, portfolio images, and other media assets for the site.

Why CrazeDev Studio

The Standard That
Sets Us Apart

We don't just deliver code. We deliver outcomes that move the needle.

⚡
Rapid Delivery
Lean sprint cycles with daily progress and predictable timelines. No vague ETAs — every milestone is documented before code is written.
💎
Uncompromised Quality
Enterprise standards on every engagement regardless of project size. Good enough is never an option at CrazeDev Studio.
🔮
Modern Technology
Next.js, React, AI-native architectures, Pterodactyl, containerised infrastructure — all in our daily toolkit.
🛡️
Dedicated Support
Every client gets direct access to their delivery team through the Client Hub. Real answers from real engineers, fast.
🔐
Security-First
Hardened servers, encrypted secrets, WAF rules, and OWASP compliance architected into every project from day one.
💰
Transparent Pricing
Scope defined up front, pricing fixed, deliverables documented before work begins. No surprise invoices, ever.

How We Work

From Brief To Launch,
Without The Chaos

01
Discovery
We learn your goals and vision in a focused call before any proposal is written.
02
Scoping
A detailed proposal with fixed scope, timeline, and pricing — no surprises.
03
Design & Build
Development in sprints with full visibility through the Client Hub at every step.
04
Review
Staged reviews and sign-offs at each milestone keep outcomes perfectly aligned.
05
Launch & Support
Seamless deployment with post-launch support window. Retainers available.
Platform Standards

Enterprise-Grade
From The Ground Up

🔒
Hardened Security
SSL, CSP headers, WAF rules, encrypted secrets, and OWASP compliance in every delivery.
📈
Infinitely Scalable
Horizontal scaling, load balancing, and CDN-first delivery. Infrastructure that grows with you.
☁️
Cloud-Native
Containerised on AWS, GCP, Hetzner or your own VPS — reproducible and fully automated.
📱
Mobile-First
Every interface built mobile-first, tested across all viewports, meeting WCAG 2.1 standards.
🧠
AI-Augmented
Intelligent features available on any project — semantic search, LLM assistants, automation.
📊
Fully Observable
Instrumented from day one — event tracking, error logging, and performance dashboards.
FAQ

Everything You Need
To Know

Timelines depend on scope. A bot or landing page typically takes 1–2 weeks. A full Minecraft network or SaaS platform runs 6–10 weeks. We provide a precise timeline in the project proposal before any work begins.
Our Pterodactyl service covers full panel installation on your VPS, Wings daemon setup across nodes, custom egg configuration for any game or software, SSL, reverse proxy, custom branding/themes, and user management setup. We also migrate from existing Pterodactyl installations.
Yes. All projects include a post-launch support window. We also offer ongoing monthly retainer packages for maintenance, feature development, and monitoring. Support is managed via the Client Hub at clienthub.crazedevstudio.xyz.
Absolutely. We regularly audit, extend, and refactor existing systems. We review what you have, identify what needs to change, and work within your existing architecture wherever possible.
Once your project begins you'll receive access to your dedicated workspace on the Client Hub at clienthub.crazedevstudio.xyz. Track milestones, submit tickets, view files, and communicate with your delivery team in real time from any device.
Fill in the contact form below, join our Discord at discord.gg/mwZA3Y95eH, or email contact@crazedevstudio.xyz. We review every submission and respond within 24 hours to arrange a discovery call. No commitment required for the initial conversation.
